languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

languages.text: "Факт второй. Некоторые виды ксеносов обладают технологической сноровкой. Их оружие и артефакты имеют деструктивные и утилитарные свойства, которые способны возвысить мощь Империума. Изучая сии свойства я нахожу способы транслировать их на технологии, ниспосланные нам Богом-Машиной. Грех изобретения не свершается — я уподобляю эти изыскания созданию новых производственных паттернов".

"Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

"Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

languages.text: «Segundo dato. Ciertas especies de xenos demuestran una gran capacidad tecnológica. Sus armas y artefactos cuentan con propiedades destructivas y funcionales que podrían aumentar el poder del Imperium. Al estudiarlas, encuentro formas de recrearlas con las tecnologías que nos ha otorgado el Dios Máquina. No se comete ningún acto profano de innovación; se asemeja más bien a la creación de nuevos patrones de producción».
languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

traits.locale_text: «Segundo dato. Ciertas especies de xenos demuestran una gran capacidad tecnológica. Sus armas y artefactos cuentan con propiedades destructivas y funcionales que podrían aumentar el poder del Imperium. Al estudiarlas, encuentro formas de recrearlas con las tecnologías que nos ha otorgado el Dios Máquina. No se comete ningún acto profano de innovación; se asemeja más bien a la creación de nuevos patrones de producción».

languages.text: “事实二。某些异形物种具备相当的技术造诣。它们的武器和造物既有杀伤力，也有实用价值，甚至可能提升帝国的整体实力。我研究这些特性，是为了找到途径，把它们转化到万机之神赐予我们的技术之上。这并不是什么邪恶的创新——在我看来，这些研究更像是在开发新的生产模式。”
languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

traits.locale_text: “事实二。某些异形物种具备相当的技术造诣。它们的武器和造物既有杀伤力，也有实用价值，甚至可能提升帝国的整体实力。我研究这些特性，是为了找到途径，把它们转化到万机之神赐予我们的技术之上。这并不是什么邪恶的创新——在我看来，这些研究更像是在开发新的生产模式。”

languages.text: « Fait numéro deux. Certaines espèces de xénos montrent des signes d'une grande maîtrise technologique. Les propriétés destructives et fonctionnelles de leurs armes et de leurs artefacts pourraient transcender la puissance de l'Imperium. En les étudiant, je découvre différentes façons de les appliquer aux technologies que nous accorde le Dieu-Machine. Je ne commets aucun acte d'innovation impie ; je comparerais plutôt mes recherches à la création de nouveaux schémas de production. »
languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

traits.locale_text: « Fait numéro deux. Certaines espèces de xénos montrent des signes d'une grande maîtrise technologique. Les propriétés destructives et fonctionnelles de leurs armes et de leurs artefacts pourraient transcender la puissance de l'Imperium. En les étudiant, je découvre différentes façons de les appliquer aux technologies que nous accorde le Dieu-Machine. Je ne commets aucun acte d'innovation impie ; je comparerais plutôt mes recherches à la création de nouveaux schémas de production. »

languages.text: "Zweitens. Gewisse Spezies von Xenos haben einen enormen technologischen Sachverstand. Ihre Waffen und Artefakte verfügen über destruktive und utilitaristische Eigenschaften, die die Macht des Imperiums steigern könnten. Durch das Studium dieser Eigenschaften finde ich Wege, sie auf die Technologien zu übertragen die uns vom Maschinengott gewährt wurden. Es gibt keine verbotenen Innovationen ... ich vergleiche diese Forschung gerne mit der Entwicklung neuer Produktionsmuster."
languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

traits.locale_text: "Zweitens. Gewisse Spezies von Xenos haben einen enormen technologischen Sachverstand. Ihre Waffen und Artefakte verfügen über destruktive und utilitaristische Eigenschaften, die die Macht des Imperiums steigern könnten. Durch das Studium dieser Eigenschaften finde ich Wege, sie auf die Technologien zu übertragen die uns vom Maschinengott gewährt wurden. Es gibt keine verbotenen Innovationen ... ich vergleiche diese Forschung gerne mit der Entwicklung neuer Produktionsmuster."

languages.text: 「事実2。ある種の異星人は技術に長けている。彼らの武器や工芸品は、インペリウムの力を高める破壊的かつ実用的な特性を持っている。私はこれらの特性を研究し、機械神から授かった技術に変換する方法を見つける。私はこの研究を、新しい生産パターンの創造に例えている。」
languages.original_text: "Fact two. Certain species of xenos exhibit technological proficiency. Their weapons and artefacts possess destructive and utilitarian properties that could elevate the power of the Imperium. In studying these properties, I find ways to translate them to the technologies bestowed upon us by the Machine God. No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."

traits.locale_text: 「事実2。ある種の異星人は技術に長けている。彼らの武器や工芸品は、インペリウムの力を高める破壊的かつ実用的な特性を持っている。私はこれらの特性を研究し、機械神から授かった技術に変換する方法を見つける。私はこの研究を、新しい生産パターンの創造に例えている。」

languages.text: "İkinci gerçek. Belirli zeno türleri, teknolojik yeterlilik sergilemekte. Silahları ve eserleri, İmparatorluk'un gücünü yükseltebilecek yıkıcı ve faydacı özelliklere sahip. Bu özellikleri inceleyerek onları Makine Tanrı'nın bize bahşettiği teknolojilere çevirmenin yollarını buluyorum. Hiçbir kötü niyetli yenilik eylemi gerçekleştirilmiyor. Bu araştırmayı yeni üretim modellerinin yaratılmasına benzetiyorum."

No wicked deed of innovation is committed — I liken this research to the creation of new production patterns."
